item.title: DSGE model
item.description: Simulation of a Dynamic Stochastic General Equilibrium model. The prodcutivity follows an AR(1) in logs. The Solution is derived trought a log-linearization. The model is calibrated to replicate the volatitiy and persistance of the output found by Kydland and Prescott.

item.title: Dynamic model with a Representative Agent
item.description: Simulation of a Dynamic model with a Representative Agent. Experiments to identify the optimal fiscal policy are performed.

item.title: Static Problem with a Representative Agent
item.description: Simulation of a non-linear static model with a Representative Agent. Experiments on different optimal fiscal policies are performed.
